rationale: For Portugal, the main indirect impact remains energy price uncertainty tied to the Iran deal stalemate; all other headlines are distant or irrelevant to daily life in Portugal.

top_events.title: Trump says US-Iran deal to be signed Sunday; Tehran disputes timing
top_events.summary: A resolved Iran deal could lower EU energy prices, benefiting Portugal's cost of living and tourism economy. Continued uncertainty maintains the status quo.

top_events.title: Canada-EU unity call before G7 summit
top_events.summary: Carney's push for Canada-EU alignment at G7 could shape trade and economic policy affecting Portugal's export-oriented economy, but outcome is uncertain.

top_events.title: New EU migration rules debated
top_events.summary: EU-wide migration policy changes have limited direct impact on Portugal but could affect EU budget and labor dynamics marginally.
